metadata.description: Tax rules for PMS, AIF, and MF investments (Post Finance Act 2024)

pms.taxation_type: Individual stock level — each buy/sell is a separate transaction

ltcg.note: Updated from 10% to 12.5% and exemption from ₹1L to ₹1.25L from July 23, 2024

pms.key_point: PMS generates multiple taxable events — higher tax complexity than MF

cat1_cat2.taxation_type: Pass-through — income taxed in hands of investor
cat1_cat2.capital_gains: Same as direct equity STCG/LTCG rates

cat3.note: No pass-through benefit — tax inefficient for HNIs

debt.taxation: Taxed at slab rate regardless of holding period
